title: Smilax vanchingshanensis
taxonomy: Smilax vanchingshanensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Smilacaceae. It is a member of the Smilax genus, which is commonly known as the greenbrier or catbrier. The Smilax genus is a group of evergreen or deciduous vines and shrubs native to tropical and subtropical regions. Smilax vanchingshanensis is native to Vietnam, and its classification places it within the family Smilacaceae, which includes over 200 species of Smilax. The classification of Smilax vanchingshanensis is still a subject of ongoing research and study.
